spec.description: The current number of workflow jobs assigned by the GitHub Actions service to ARC scale sets, by cluster.
spec.title: Assigned Jobs [cluster, scale_set]

spec.expr: (100 * (1 - (sum by(cluster) (gha_running_jobs{cluster=~"$cluster", name=~"$scale_set"}) / sum by(cluster) (gha_assigned_jobs{cluster=~"$cluster", name=~"$scale_set"})))) and on(cluster) (sum by(cluster) (gha_assigned_jobs{cluster=~"$cluster", name=~"$scale_set"}) > 0)

spec.description: Percent of jobs assigned to the scale set that are not yet running on a runner.
spec.title: % of Assigned Jobs Not Running [cluster, scale_set]

spec.expr: (100 * clamp_min(sum by(cluster) (gha_assigned_jobs{cluster=~"$cluster", name=~"$scale_set"}) - sum by(cluster) (gha_running_jobs{cluster=~"$cluster", name=~"$scale_set"}) - 600 * max_over_time((clamp_min(sum by(cluster) (deriv(gha_running_jobs{cluster=~"$cluster", name=~"$scale_set"}[5m])) + sum by(cluster) (rate(gha_completed_jobs_total{cluster=~"$cluster", name=~"$scale_set"}[5m])), 0))[28d:5m]), 0) / sum by(cluster) (gha_assigned_jobs{cluster=~"$cluster", name=~"$scale_set"})) and on(cluster) (sum by(cluster) (gha_assigned_jobs{cluster=~"$cluster", name=~"$scale_set"}) > 0)

spec.description: Percent of assigned jobs that, based on historical peak runner start rate over the last 28 days, should already be running by now. A 10-minute grace window is applied: jobs that fit within what the system could start in 10 minutes at peak observed throughput are not counted. Reads near 0% when the system is ramping at expected speed; climbs when jobs are accumulating faster than capacity has historically allowed.
spec.title: Startup Throughput Adjusted % of Assigned Jobs Not Running [cluster, scale_set]

spec.description: The total number of jobs running.
spec.title: Running Jobs [cluster, scale_set]

spec.expr: (100 * (avg_over_time((sum by(cluster) (gha_running_jobs{cluster=~"$cluster", name=~"$scale_set"}))[3h:]) - avg_over_time((sum by(cluster) (gha_running_jobs{cluster=~"$cluster", name=~"$scale_set"} offset 1w))[3h:])) / avg_over_time((sum by(cluster) (gha_running_jobs{cluster=~"$cluster", name=~"$scale_set"} offset 1w))[3h:])) and on(cluster) (avg_over_time((sum by(cluster) (gha_running_jobs{cluster=~"$cluster", name=~"$scale_set"} offset 1w))[3h:]) > 0)

spec.description: Week-over-week percentage change in the 3-hour rolling average of running jobs.
spec.title: Running Jobs Week-over-Week % Change, 3h Avg [cluster, scale_set]

spec.expr: (100 * (avg_over_time((sum by(cluster) (gha_assigned_jobs{cluster=~"$cluster", name=~"$scale_set"}))[3h:]) - avg_over_time((sum by(cluster) (gha_assigned_jobs{cluster=~"$cluster", name=~"$scale_set"} offset 1w))[3h:])) / avg_over_time((sum by(cluster) (gha_assigned_jobs{cluster=~"$cluster", name=~"$scale_set"} offset 1w))[3h:])) and on(cluster) (avg_over_time((sum by(cluster) (gha_assigned_jobs{cluster=~"$cluster", name=~"$scale_set"} offset 1w))[3h:]) > 0)

spec.description: Week-over-week percentage change in the 3-hour rolling average of assigned jobs.
spec.title: Assigned Jobs Week-over-Week % Change, 3h Avg [cluster, scale_set]

spec.expr: clamp_min(sum by(cluster, name) (gha_assigned_jobs{cluster=~"$cluster", name=~"$scale_set"}) - sum by(cluster, name) (gha_running_jobs{cluster=~"$cluster", name=~"$scale_set"}), 0)

spec.description: Estimated jobs waiting for a runner by scale set/machine type. Calculated as ARC assigned jobs minus ARC running jobs.
spec.title: Assigned Jobs Waiting to Run by Scale Set [cluster, scale_set]

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(created_at, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) AS time,
  uniqExact(id) AS jobs
FROM default.workflow_job
WHERE match(repository_full_name, '^(${repository:regex})$')
  AND arrayExists(label -> match(label, '^(mt|lf)-(rel-)?l-'), labels)
  AND (
    (runner_group_name IN ('default', 'release-runners') AND match('pytorch-arc-cbr-production', '^(${cluster:regex})$'))
    OR (runner_group_name = 'arc-cbr-prod-uw1' AND match('pytorch-arc-cbr-production-uw1', '^(${cluster:regex})$'))
    OR (runner_group_name = 'meta-prod-aws-ue1' AND match('meta-prod-aws-ue1', '^(${cluster:regex})$'))
    OR (runner_group_name = 'lf-prod-aws-ue1' AND match('lf-prod-aws-ue1', '^(${cluster:regex})$'))
    OR (runner_group_name = 'lf-prod-aws-ue2' AND match('lf-prod-aws-ue2', '^(${cluster:regex})$'))
  )
  AND $__timeFilter(created_at)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time ASC

spec.description: Count of unique GitHub Actions workflow jobs picked up by OSDC production runners for the selected repositories and clusters, aggregated in 5-minute buckets.
spec.title: Jobs Submitted to OSDC Runners, per 5min [cluster, repository]

spec.expr: clamp_min(300 * (sum by(cluster) (deriv(gha_running_jobs{cluster=~"$cluster", name=~"$scale_set"}[5m])) + sum by(cluster) (rate(gha_completed_jobs_total{cluster=~"$cluster", name=~"$scale_set"}[5m]))), 0)

spec.description: Number of new jobs starting to run per 5-minute bucket. Computed as the derivative of running jobs plus the completion rate (since running = started - completed), scaled to a 5-minute window. A flat or low value while jobs are queued indicates the system is not adding runners fast enough; a high value indicates active ramp-up.
spec.title: Runner Start Rate, Jobs per 5min [cluster, scale_set]

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
    bucket_time AS time,
    dateDiff('second', j_created_at, bucket_time) / 60.0 AS queue_minutes
FROM (
    SELECT
        argMax(created_at, started_at) AS j_created_at,
        argMax(status, started_at) AS j_status,
        argMax(runner_group_name, started_at) AS j_runner_group_name,
        argMax(labels, started_at) AS j_labels,
        max(_inserted_at) AS j_last_insert,
        if(argMax(status, started_at) IN ('queued', 'waiting'), now64(9), argMax(started_at, started_at)) AS j_queue_end
    FROM default.workflow_job
    PREWHERE created_at <= $__toTime
        AND created_at >= $__fromTime - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
    WHERE arrayExists(x -> startsWith(x, 'mt-l-') OR startsWith(x, 'mt-rel-l-') OR startsWith(x, 'lf-l-') OR startsWith(x, 'lf-rel-l-'), labels)
        AND match(repository_full_name, '^(${repository:regex})$')
    GROUP BY id
    HAVING NOT arrayExists(x -> position(x, 'h100') > 0 OR position(x, 'b200') > 0 OR position(x, 'gb200') > 0 OR position(x, 'a100') > 0, j_labels)
        AND arrayExists(x -> match(x, '^(${runner_name_prefix:regex})$'), j_labels)
        AND (
          (j_runner_group_name IN ('default', 'release-runners') AND match('pytorch-arc-cbr-production', '^(${cluster:regex})$'))
          OR (j_runner_group_name = 'arc-cbr-prod-uw1' AND match('pytorch-arc-cbr-production-uw1', '^(${cluster:regex})$'))
          OR (j_runner_group_name = 'meta-prod-aws-ue1' AND match('meta-prod-aws-ue1', '^(${cluster:regex})$'))
          OR (j_runner_group_name = 'lf-prod-aws-ue1' AND match('lf-prod-aws-ue1', '^(${cluster:regex})$'))
          OR (j_runner_group_name = 'lf-prod-aws-ue2' AND match('lf-prod-aws-ue2', '^(${cluster:regex})$'))
          OR (j_runner_group_name = '' AND j_status IN ('queued', 'waiting') AND j_last_insert > now() - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
        )
        AND j_queue_end >= $__fromTime
) ARRAY JOIN
    arrayDistinct(arrayConcat(
        arrayFilter(
            t -> t >= j_created_at AND t >= $__fromTime AND t <= $__toTime,
            arrayMap(x -> toDateTime64(x, 9),
                range(
                    toUInt32(intDiv(toUInt32(greatest(j_created_at, $__fromTime)), 300) * 300),
                    toUInt32(intDiv(toUInt32(least(j_queue_end, $__toTime)), 300) * 300) + 300,
                    300
                )
            )
        ),
        if(j_queue_end >= $__fromTime AND j_queue_end <= $__toTime, [j_queue_end], [])
    )) AS bucket_time
WHERE bucket_time <= j_queue_end
ORDER BY bucket_time

spec.description: Per-job queue time distribution over time for OSDC production runners, excluding capacity-constrained GPU runners (h100, b200, gb200, a100). Each 5-minute bucket between a job's created_at and started_at (or now, if still queued) contributes a point at its current accumulated queue duration, so a long-queued job shows rising values across every bucket of its wait instead of a single point at start. Y-axis log scale, minutes.
spec.title: Queue Time Distribution (excl. capacity-constrained instances) [cluster, repository, runner_name_prefix]

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
    bucket_time AS time,
    dateDiff('second', j_created_at, bucket_time) / 60.0 AS queue_minutes
FROM (
    SELECT
        argMax(created_at, started_at) AS j_created_at,
        argMax(status, started_at) AS j_status,
        argMax(runner_group_name, started_at) AS j_runner_group_name,
        argMax(labels, started_at) AS j_labels,
        max(_inserted_at) AS j_last_insert,
        if(argMax(status, started_at) IN ('queued', 'waiting'), now64(9), argMax(started_at, started_at)) AS j_queue_end
    FROM default.workflow_job
    PREWHERE created_at <= $__toTime
        AND created_at >= $__fromTime - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
    WHERE arrayExists(x -> startsWith(x, 'mt-l-') OR startsWith(x, 'mt-rel-l-') OR startsWith(x, 'lf-l-') OR startsWith(x, 'lf-rel-l-'), labels)
        AND match(repository_full_name, '^(${repository:regex})$')
    GROUP BY id
    HAVING arrayExists(x -> position(x, 'h100') > 0 OR position(x, 'b200') > 0 OR position(x, 'gb200') > 0 OR position(x, 'a100') > 0, j_labels)
        AND arrayExists(x -> match(x, '^(${runner_name_prefix:regex})$'), j_labels)
        AND (
          (j_runner_group_name IN ('default', 'release-runners') AND match('pytorch-arc-cbr-production', '^(${cluster:regex})$'))
          OR (j_runner_group_name = 'arc-cbr-prod-uw1' AND match('pytorch-arc-cbr-production-uw1', '^(${cluster:regex})$'))
          OR (j_runner_group_name = 'meta-prod-aws-ue1' AND match('meta-prod-aws-ue1', '^(${cluster:regex})$'))
          OR (j_runner_group_name = 'lf-prod-aws-ue1' AND match('lf-prod-aws-ue1', '^(${cluster:regex})$'))
          OR (j_runner_group_name = 'lf-prod-aws-ue2' AND match('lf-prod-aws-ue2', '^(${cluster:regex})$'))
          OR (j_runner_group_name = '' AND j_status IN ('queued', 'waiting') AND j_last_insert > now() - INTERVAL 3 HOUR)
        )
        AND j_queue_end >= $__fromTime
) ARRAY JOIN
    arrayDistinct(arrayConcat(
        arrayFilter(
            t -> t >= j_created_at AND t >= $__fromTime AND t <= $__toTime,
            arrayMap(x -> toDateTime64(x, 9),
                range(
                    toUInt32(intDiv(toUInt32(greatest(j_created_at, $__fromTime)), 300) * 300),
                    toUInt32(intDiv(toUInt32(least(j_queue_end, $__toTime)), 300) * 300) + 300,
                    300
                )
            )
        ),
        if(j_queue_end >= $__fromTime AND j_queue_end <= $__toTime, [j_queue_end], [])
    )) AS bucket_time
WHERE bucket_time <= j_queue_end
ORDER BY bucket_time

spec.description: Per-job queue time distribution over time for OSDC production runners, ONLY capacity-constrained GPU runners (h100, b200, gb200, a100). Each 5-minute bucket between a job's created_at and started_at (or now, if still queued) contributes a point at its current accumulated queue duration, so a long-queued job shows rising values across every bucket of its wait instead of a single point at start. Y-axis log scale, minutes.
spec.title: Queue Time Distribution (capacity-constrained instances only) [cluster, repository, runner_name_prefix]

spec.definition: SELECT DISTINCT extract(runner_name, '^(.+)-[^-]+-runner-[^-]+$') AS prefix FROM default.workflow_job WHERE arrayExists(x -> startsWith(x, 'mt-l-') OR startsWith(x, 'mt-rel-l-') OR startsWith(x, 'lf-l-') OR startsWith(x, 'lf-rel-l-'), labels) AND started_at > now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY AND runner_group_name IN ('default', 'release-runners', 'arc-cbr-prod-uw1', 'meta-prod-aws-ue1', 'lf-prod-aws-ue1', 'lf-prod-aws-ue2') AND extract(runner_name, '^(.+)-[^-]+-runner-[^-]+$') != '' ORDER BY prefix
spec.label: Runner name
spec.name: runner_name_prefix

spec.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT extract(runner_name, '^(.+)-[^-]+-runner-[^-]+$') AS prefix FROM default.workflow_job WHERE arrayExists(x -> startsWith(x, 'mt-l-') OR startsWith(x, 'mt-rel-l-') OR startsWith(x, 'lf-l-') OR startsWith(x, 'lf-rel-l-'), labels) AND started_at > now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY AND runner_group_name IN ('default', 'release-runners', 'arc-cbr-prod-uw1', 'meta-prod-aws-ue1', 'lf-prod-aws-ue1', 'lf-prod-aws-ue2') AND extract(runner_name, '^(.+)-[^-]+-runner-[^-]+$') != '' ORDER BY prefix
